    "### Environment"

   "source": [
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "\n",
    "class HiddenStateEnvironment:\n",
    "    def __init__(self, switch_probability=0.05):\n",
    "        self.state = 0  # 0 = State A (Left rewarded), 1 = State B (Right rewarded)\n",
    "        self.switch_prob = switch_probability  # chance of switching each step\n",
    "\n",
    "    def step(self, action):\n",
    "        # maybe switch state\n",
    "        if np.random.rand() < self.switch_prob:\n",
    "            self.state = 1 - self.state  # flip between 0 and 1\n",
    "\n",
    "        # reward depends on whether action matches current state\n",
    "        # action 0 = Left, action 1 = Right\n",
    "        correct_action = self.state  # state 0 → correct is Left (0), state 1 → correct is Right (1)\n",
    "        reward = 1 if action == correct_action else 0\n",
    "        return reward, self.state  # we return true state only for logging"
   ]
  },

   "source": [
    "### Reactive agent - uses a small window average, not perfectly heuristic"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "ecffdb0c",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-22T00:40:27.919906Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-22T00:40:27.919606Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-22T00:40:27.925059Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-22T00:40:27.924115Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.010364,
     "end_time": "2026-04-22T00:40:27.926315+00:00",

     "start_time": "2026-04-22T00:40:27.915951+00:00",
     "status": "completed"

    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "class ReactiveAgent:\n",
    "    def __init__(self, window=3):\n",
    "        self.history = []  # stores (action, reward) tuples\n",
    "        self.window = window\n",
    "\n",
    "    def choose_action(self):\n",
    "        if len(self.history) < 2:\n",
    "            return np.random.randint(2)\n",
    "        recent = self.history[-self.window:]\n",
    "        left_rewards  = np.mean([r for a, r in recent if a == 0]) if any(a==0 for a,r in recent) else 0\n",
    "        right_rewards = np.mean([r for a, r in recent if a == 1]) if any(a==1 for a,r in recent) else 0\n",
    "        return 0 if left_rewards >= right_rewards else 1\n",
    "\n",
    "    def update(self, action, reward):\n",
    "        self.history.append((action, reward))"
   ]
  },

    "class RLAgent:\n",
    "    def __init__(self, learning_rate=0.05, epsilon=0.20):\n",
    "        self.q = [0.5, 0.5]\n",
    "        self.lr = learning_rate\n",
    "        self.epsilon = epsilon\n",
    "\n",
    "    def choose_action(self):\n",
    "        if np.random.rand() < self.epsilon:\n",
    "            return np.random.randint(2)\n",
    "        return np.argmax(self.q)\n",
    "\n",
    "    def update(self, action, reward):\n",
    "        self.q[action] += self.lr * (reward - self.q[action])"
   ]
  },

   "source": [
    "### Active inference agent with uncertain priors"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "2ff5b615",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-22T00:40:27.955079Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-22T00:40:27.954717Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-22T00:40:27.960889Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-22T00:40:27.960155Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.011031,
     "end_time": "2026-04-22T00:40:27.962250+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-22T00:40:27.951219+00:00",
     "status": "completed"

    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "class ActiveInferenceAgent:\n",
    "    def __init__(self):\n",
    "        self.belief = np.array([0.5, 0.5])  # starts with no idea which state\n",
    "\n",
    "        # slightly uncertain likelihoods — agent doesn't know the task perfectly\n",
    "        self.likelihood = np.array([\n",
    "            [0.75, 0.25],  # action=Left,  reward=1\n",
    "            [0.25, 0.75],  # action=Right, reward=1\n",
    "            [0.25, 0.75],  # action=Left,  reward=0\n",
    "            [0.75, 0.25],  # action=Right, reward=0\n",
    "        ])\n",
    "\n",
    "        # agent slightly underestimates how often switches happen\n",
    "        self.transition = np.array([\n",
    "            [0.92, 0.08],\n",
    "            [0.08, 0.92],\n",
    "        ])\n",
    "\n",
    "    def choose_action(self):\n",
    "        expected_reward_left  = self.belief[0] * 0.75 + self.belief[1] * 0.25\n",
    "        expected_reward_right = self.belief[0] * 0.25 + self.belief[1] * 0.75\n",
    "        return 0 if expected_reward_left > expected_reward_right else 1\n",
    "\n",
    "    def update(self, action, reward):\n",
    "        predicted_belief = self.transition.T @ self.belief\n",
    "        if reward == 1 and action == 0: row = 0\n",
    "        elif reward == 1 and action == 1: row = 1\n",
    "        elif reward == 0 and action == 0: row = 2\n",
    "        else: row = 3\n",
    "        updated = self.likelihood[row] * predicted_belief\n",
    "        self.belief = updated / updated.sum()"
   ]
  },

   "source": [
    "### Comparison: one shared sequence of switches and rewards"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 6,
   "id": "e641b5a3",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-22T00:40:27.973394Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-22T00:40:27.972932Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-22T00:40:28.036616Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-22T00:40:28.035968Z"
    },

     "duration": 0.068924,
     "end_time": "2026-04-22T00:40:28.038456+00:00",

   "source": [
    "def run_experiment_fixed_env(agent, rewards_schedule, actions_schedule=None, n_steps=500):\n",
    "    \"\"\"Run agent against a pre-determined environment sequence\"\"\"\n",
    "    rewards = []\n",
    "    for t in range(n_steps):\n",
    "        action = agent.choose_action()\n",
    "        # environment responds based on action AND the true state at time t\n",
    "        reward = rewards_schedule[action][t]\n",
    "        agent.update(action, reward)\n",
    "        rewards.append(reward)\n",
    "    return rewards\n",
    "\n",
    "# Build a fixed environment sequence all agents share\n",
    "np.random.seed(42)\n",
    "n_steps = 500\n",
    "switch_prob = 0.05\n",
    "\n",
    "# Generate the true hidden state sequence\n",
    "true_states = [0]\n",
    "for _ in range(n_steps - 1):\n",
    "    if np.random.rand() < switch_prob:\n",
    "        true_states.append(1 - true_states[-1])\n",
    "    else:\n",
    "        true_states.append(true_states[-1])\n",
    "true_states = np.array(true_states)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Pre-generate reward outcomes for each action at each timestep\n",
    "# reward=1 if action matches state, with some noise\n",
    "def get_reward(action, state, noise=0.05):\n",
    "    correct = int(action == state)\n",
    "    if np.random.rand() < noise:\n",
    "        return 1 - correct  # occasionally flip\n",
    "       # return 1 - correct if rng.rand() < noise else correct\n",
    "    return correct\n",
    "\n",
    "# run on same environment 1 seed\n",
    "def run_on_shared_env(agent, true_states, rng):\n",
    "    rewards = []\n",
    "    for t in range(len(true_states)):\n",
    "        action = agent.choose_action()\n",
    "        reward = get_reward(action, true_states[t], rng)\n",
    "        agent.update(action, reward)\n",
    "        rewards.append(reward)\n",
    "    return np.array(rewards)\n",
    "\n",
    "np.random.seed(0)\n",
    "reactive_rewards = run_on_shared_env(ReactiveAgent(), true_states, 1)\n",
    "np.random.seed(0)\n",
    "rl_rewards       = run_on_shared_env(RLAgent(), true_states, 1)\n",
    "np.random.seed(0)\n",
    "ai_rewards       = run_on_shared_env(ActiveInferenceAgent(), true_states, 1)\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "    \n",
    "\n"
   ]
  },
  {

    "def smooth(x, window=20):\n",
    "    return np.convolve(x, np.ones(window)/window, mode='valid')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Find switch points\n",
    "switch_points = np.where(np.diff(true_states) != 0)[0]\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.figure(figsize=(13, 5))\n",
    "\n",
    "# shade switch moments\n",
    "for sp in switch_points:\n",
    "    plt.axvline(x=sp, color='gray', alpha=0.2, linewidth=1)\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.plot(smooth(reactive_rewards), label='Reactive', color='red')\n",
    "plt.plot(smooth(rl_rewards),       label='RL (Q-learning)', color='orange')\n",
    "plt.plot(smooth(ai_rewards),       label='Active Inference', color='blue')\n",
    "plt.axhline(0.5, color='gray', linestyle='--', label='Chance')\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.xlabel('Time step')\n",
    "plt.ylabel('Reward rate (smoothed)')\n",
    "plt.title('Adaptation to hidden state switches (shared environment)')\n",
    "plt.legend()\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },
  {

   "source": [
    "def recovery_time(rewards, switch_points, threshold=0.5, window=20):\n",
    "    smoothed = np.convolve(rewards, np.ones(window)/window, mode='valid')\n",
    "    times = []\n",
    "    for sp in switch_points:\n",
    "        if sp + 50 < len(smoothed):\n",
    "            recovery = np.where(smoothed[sp:sp+50] > threshold)[0]\n",
    "            times.append(recovery[0] if len(recovery) > 0 else 50)\n",
    "    return np.mean(times)\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"Reactive recovery:\", recovery_time(reactive_rewards, switch_points))\n",
    "print(\"RL recovery:\", recovery_time(rl_rewards, switch_points))\n",
    "print(\"AI recovery:\", recovery_time(ai_rewards, switch_points))"
   ]
  },

    "print(\"Reactive:\",smooth(reactive_rewards).mean())\n",

   "source": [
    "from scipy import stats\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "\n",
    "def report_ttest(name, a, b):\n",
    "    t, p = stats.ttest_ind(a.flatten(), b.flatten())\n",
    "    if p < 1e-500:\n",
    "        p_str = \"p < 10^500\"\n",
    "    elif p < 0.001:\n",
    "        p_str = f\"p < 0.001\"\n",
    "    else:\n",
    "        p_str = f\"p = {p:.3f}\"\n",
    "    print(f\"{name}: t({len(a.flatten())+len(b.flatten())-2}) = {t:.2f}, {p_str}\")\n",
    "\n",
    "report_ttest(\"AI vs RL\", smooth(ai_rewards), smooth(rl_rewards))\n",
    "report_ttest(\"AI vs Reactive\", smooth(ai_rewards), smooth(reactive_rewards))"
   ]
  }
 ],
